message:
style: clippy fixes and idiomatic Rust improvements across 10 files

src/config.rs:
- Replace prop_assert_eq! for f64 comparison with explicit epsilon
  check (prop_assert!((a - b).abs() <= f64::EPSILON)) to handle
  floating-point comparison correctly in proptest

src/model.rs:
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on reserialized value (already owned)
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on serialized value before move

src/session.rs:
- Remove redundant .prop_map(|s| s.to_string()) on entry_id_strategy
  (proptest string regex already returns String)
- Replace closure .prop_map(|v| Value::Array(v)) with method reference
  .prop_map(Value::Array)
- Replace .iter().map(|e| e.to_string()) with .iter().map(ToString::to_string)

src/session_index.rs:
- Simplify expected_count: remove unnecessary i64::try_from().unwrap_or()
  cast that was a no-op (message_count is already the right type)

src/vcr.rs:
- Remove unnecessary mut on value parameter and redundant .clone()
  in redact_json_is_idempotent proptest

src/provider.rs:
- Add PartialEq derive to ModelCost struct (needed for RpcModelInfo
  comparisons in SDK tests)

benches/tools.rs:
- Fix backtick formatting in doc comment (push_str, Arc::clone)

tests/e2e_golden_corpus.rs:
- Replace .map(|entries| ...).unwrap_or(0) with .map_or(0, ...)
- Simplify panic message extraction with chained or_else
- Add #[allow(clippy::struct_excessive_bools)] on GoldenExpected
- Add reason string to #[ignore = "..."] attribute

tests/validate_e2e_artifact_schema.rs:
- Replace format!("... {}", VAR) with format!("... {VAR}") in 4
  assert_eq! messages (inline format args)

tests/sdk_api.rs:
- Replace let _name = ... with let _: Type = ... for cleaner bindings
- Promote assert_clone_debug_send_sync to const fn
- Add trait assertions for new SDK types: RpcModelInfo, RpcSessionState,
  RpcSessionStats, RpcCommandInfo
- Add RpcSessionState serde round-trip test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
